personal.name: Owais Javaid
personal.title: Creative Designer & Visual Storyteller
personal.description: Creative Designer & Visual Storyteller based in Karachi. I craft brand identities, design campaigns, and produce video content that makes organizations unforgettable.
bio: I'm Owais Javaid, a Creative Designer and Visual Storyteller based in Karachi, Pakistan. Over the past 4+ years, I've been making sure the right message reaches the right people — beautifully.

My work spans brand identity, graphic design, video production, and digital content, built for organizations that want to make a real impression. Currently, I'm at Patients' Aid Foundation, where I translate a life-saving healthcare mission into compelling visual campaigns.
personal.quote: I don't just make things look good. I ask: what do we want people to feel? What action should they take? Then I design backward from that answer.
personal.contactCTA: If you're a nonprofit, startup, or brand that needs a designer who cares about the work as much as you do — let's talk.

services.title: Brand Identity
services.description: Logos, visual systems, and brand guidelines that are consistent and ownable.

services.title: Video Production
services.description: From concept to final cut — cinematography and motion graphics.

services.title: Graphic Design
services.description: Social media creatives, posters, marketing materials, and digital assets.

services.title: Digital Content
services.description: Campaign visuals, email templates, and performance-focused ad creatives.

projects.title: SIHA Organic Detox Oil | Social Media & Brand Visuals
projects.description: Designed a comprehensive visual campaign for Pakistan's leading healthcare nonprofit that reached over 50,000 people on social media and drove a 30% increase in donations during Ramadan.

projects.title: LOOP MEDIA — Continuity in Design
projects.description: Built graphic templates reused across multiple client accounts, cutting production time by approximately 25%. Delivered on tight deadlines with zero revision rejections.

projects.description: Delivered brand identity packages (logo, color system, typography) for multiple clients across e-commerce, retail, and services sectors with a 60% repeat client rate.

projects.description: Short-form video content for social media that increased average post engagement by 70% compared to the previous quarter. From concept to final cut.

experience.title: Creative Designer
points: Designed visual campaigns for Pakistan's leading healthcare nonprofit, producing assets/month across social, print, and digital channels.
Developed a consistent brand visual language across all patient-facing materials, improving campaign cohesion and donor recognition.
Produced short-form video content for social media that increased average post engagement by 70%.

experience.title: Creative Specialist
points: Designed performance-focused creatives for digital ad campaigns, supporting paid social strategies for brand clients.
Collaborated with marketing teams to translate campaign objectives into visuals — delivered on tight deadlines with zero revision rejections.
Built graphic templates reused across multiple client accounts, cutting production time by approximately 25%.

experience.title: Senior Graphic Designer
points: Created branded marketing collateral, including brochures, banners, and digital assets for multiple brands.
Supported internal communications design needs, ensuring visual consistency across departments.
Incorporated client feedback across multiple rounds to deliver final-approved assets.

experience.title: Freelance Designer
points: Delivered brand identity packages (logo, color system, typography) for clients across e-commerce, retail, and services.
Managed full design lifecycle independently — from client brief to final delivery — with a 60% repeat client rate.
Created social media content calendars and visual templates that reduced content creation time by 40%.

experience.title: Graphic Designer
points: Created visually stunning graphics, logos, and branding elements for corporate clients.
Developed innovative design concepts that met and exceeded client expectations.
Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).
